title: AFMP: A Few More Plushies
description: A mod that adds new plushies to the game, which can be found in dungeons
body:
### 🎮 **Introducing AFMP: A FEW MORE PLUSHIES Mod for Minecraft! 🧸**

Are you tired of battling Creepers and Endermen in Minecraft without a fluffy friend by your side? Fear not, because AFMP is here to add a touch of cuddly cuteness to your blocky adventures!  
  
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/A_Few_More_Plushies/BH_AFMP_header.webp)

### ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/A_Few_More_Plushies/BH_AFMP_banner.webp)  
🌟 **What's AFMP All About?**

AFMP, or A FEW MORE PLUSHIES, is the ultimate Minecraft mod for plushie enthusiasts and pixelated adventurers alike! With this mod installed, you'll discover a delightful collection of seven adorable plushies waiting to join you on your journey through the pixelated realms.

![](https://hastastudios.zelthoriaismp.cloud/afmp.png)

### ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/A_Few_More_Plushies/BH_AFMP_banner.webp)

###   
🎒 **Bag 'Em All!**

But wait, there's a twist! In order to add these charming companions to your collection, you'll need to get your hands on a special Plushie Bag. These magical bags can be found tucked away in dungeons or scattered throughout the game's structures, just waiting for an intrepid adventurer like yourself to uncover them. Once you've secured a Plushie Bag, brace yourself for the excitement of discovering which plushie awaits inside!

### ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/A_Few_More_Plushies/BH_AFMP_banner.webp)
